query: SELECT p.id, p.firstName, p.lastName, p.email, p.status, p.subscriptionTier, COUNT(pa.id) as assignedProtocols FROM patients p LEFT JOIN protocol_assignments pa ON pa.patientId = p.id WHERE p.id = 390003 GROUP BY p.id; SELECT pa.id, pr.name as protocolName, pa.status, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM protocol_steps ps WHERE ps.protocolId = pr.id) as stepCount FROM protocol_assignments pa JOIN protocols pr ON pr.id = pa.protocolId WHERE pa.patientId = 390003;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 4Loc9eiqTeCpHbm.bfc0203d8e87 --database 2VRczM8SEoMgkRv9pxV2Z3 --execute SELECT p.id, p.firstName, p.lastName, p.email, p.status, p.subscriptionTier, COUNT(pa.id) as assignedProtocols FROM patients p LEFT JOIN protocol_assignments pa ON pa.patientId = p.id WHERE p.id = 390003 GROUP BY p.id; SELECT pa.id, pr.name as protocolName, pa.status, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM protocol_steps ps WHERE ps.protocolId = pr.id) as stepCount FROM protocol_assignments pa JOIN protocols pr ON pr.id = pa.protocolId WHERE pa.patientId = 390003;
